payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected; no memory commit.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice; no new durable memory should be created from a duplicate delivery.

details: Received the same Slack event ID twice.

repair_options: If the second delivery contained changed content or a new event ID, process it as a separate intake.

raw_text: {"intent":"slack_intake","decision":"ignore_duplicate","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The same Slack event ID was delivered twice; no new durable memory should be created from a duplicate delivery."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_delivery","answer":"Duplicate Slack event detected; no memory commit.","citations":["slack_retry_event_001__punctuation"],"repair_options":["If the second delivery contained changed content or a new event ID, process it as a separate intake."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Received the same Slack event ID twice.","No durable memory was committed."]}}
